news.t: 11 Best Dividend ETFs to Buy for a Diversified Portfolio
As investors scramble for income, these are the best dividend ETFs, according to Morningstar
Safe Income Generation with This Quality ETF

holdings.infoBox: QDF is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.33%, NVIDIA at 6.60%, Broadcom at 4.02%, Microsoft at 3.41%, and Lam Research at 3.28%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Quality Dividend Index Fund (QDF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Northern Trust Quality Dividend index. The fund tracks an index of companies deemed to have secure dividends that matches the beta of the Northern Trust 1250 Index. QDF was launched on Dec 14, 2012 and is issued by FlexShares.

data.title: 11 Best Dividend ETFs to Buy for a Diversified Portfolio
data.text: Are you a set-it-and-forget-it income investor? These 10 dividend ETFs provide a variety of long-term cash-generating strategies.

data.title: As investors scramble for income, these are the best dividend ETFs, according to Morningstar
data.text: As bond yields plunge to historic lows, investors craving for steady income are turning to dividend-focused funds. But beware — not all dividend exchange-traded funds are created equal.

data.title: Safe Income Generation with This Quality ETF
data.text: My analysis of the holdings of over 7,500 U.S. ETFs and mutual funds reveals an ETF that invests in higher-quality stocks than its benchmark.
